variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 1371 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 1371 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 1371 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 308.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 293.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 155.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 42.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 11.0 mm

variants.title: Mann Filter C 31 101/1 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 1371
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 31 101/1 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 1371
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Dimension A: 307.0 mm, Dimension B: 153.0 mm, Dimension H: 42.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P607332 Air Filter, Panel Ventilation | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 1371
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P607332 Air Filter, Panel Ventilation | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 1371
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P607332 Air Filter, Panel Ventilation is engineered to provide superior air filtration for ventilation systems, capturing dust, debris, and other airborne particles. It helps maintain clean airflow in enclosed spaces, improving air quality and protecting sensitive equipment. With its durable panel design, this filter offers long service life and consistent performance. It is ideal for use in HVAC systems, industrial ventilation, and other applications requiring reliable air filtration.
